textByHash.01c2a15f87617b71a9b3dc2e8292bb4494b24228: How forgetful are you? Get some bellows and fill them with the dye you want. Then just head down to the Feldip Hills, find a toad and use the bellows to fill it up.
textByHash.0a691890e8db0b5dd7f4b56f43b6f67815d21bf4: You get loads of them down in the Feldip Hills, especially near the ponds.
textByHash.0b81d5813f39cc29adcfc326b96328354ea38da0: I don't think I can take much more!
textByHash.11567ccbb90d440874b185f3f0b209d35fef8dac: Thanks... Toads always hit the spot!
textByHash.24dfc34e3593c89ec7f2398f514d563bc1522981: I got no need for that, keep it.
textByHash.2734d663baa112b76d5b160e295390614c825533: It's just the wife, she won't stop moaning!
textByHash.3986d498aa2722d61f0b2375a84b951813940b13: You mourners are really not very good at this are you? Fine, since you gave me some crunchies, the parcels are actually toads.
textByHash.41b93280abcc961346ffc7f151da5d46c57026b4: The mourners left plenty of stuff behind, thought I'd see if there was anything useful.
textByHash.44aa80c64890151fb19381f027d634b5eb87afe4: Yes, toads. Get some bellows and fill them with the dye you want. Then just find a toad and use the bellows to fill it up.
textByHash.5b2699264b6abdef600b3e52b1689b9bad1dce96: It's good to see a human with a positive attitude.
textByHash.6c96d41be376f7e99c53386bbec238e4515abb18: You're the human that dealt with those mourners aren't you? Thanks for that, they were really bothersome.
textByHash.73e18b28b8c19c559ecb24a94d154d81aaf32337: Yes, we try to keep it that way.
textByHash.89d11c8567757f588cc28ac3248a9afd3c4e05c5: Maybe you should give me more toad crunchies. Ask any gnome, 'toad should be in everything' they'll tell you, mark my words.
textByHash.91d258ea17b6cd556dc9d1e028bc8a2022869da4: Well if you don't need anything else I'd like to be left in peace.
textByHash.ad2a35eb9f4f0d0054669163df99c246cbc4f562: Oh and torturing gnomes is perfectly fine? Hypocrite.
textByHash.b0b1e843ec60380bd5226b4b21a943007358b2c1: Can't stop sorry! Busy, busy, busy!
textByHash.b790c9c97f43c18fda291879281ef55601b1e335: Catching chompy birds? You mourners are weird. Anyway, if you don't need anything else I'd like to be left in peace.
textByHash.d3f3c7d76e841338884d22a736b3706cfc6ccf8a: Hello traveller. Are you enjoying your stay?
textByHash.d860ada27621082ad1b2bb389e5ddfd81264ea8c: Right, here you go. Now leave me to eat my crunchies in peace.
textByHash.e36c01c16a15989c69fa7593ccc2d9f56c2a5566: Ahh they're fine, a bit of dye never hurt anything... It's the firing them out the device that kills them.
